caption: A presentation slide is displayed throughout the video, featuring a white background with a yellow horizontal band across the center. The slide contains the heading "Trust annual reporting to CPC" in black text. Below the heading, a text block states, "Housing trusts must track CPA funds separately and annually report to CPC to account for funds in CP-3 report to DOR." To the right of this text is an image of a formal document titled "WHOLESALE AFFORDABLE HOUSING TRUST." The bottom of the slide includes a logo consisting of a stylized yellow "K" and the letters "MHP" in black. In the top right corner, a small inset video shows a woman with dark hair wearing a dark top. Across the sequence of frames, the slide remains static, while the woman in the inset video appears to be speaking, with slight changes in her facial expression and posture.
